signal_logic.trigger: Monitor daily changes in ad impressions for the universe. Generate a buy signal when daily impression volume increases by more than 10% compared to the prior day, indicating a volatility spike.

entry_exit.entry: Buy when daily impression volume jumps more than 10%.
entry_exit.exit: Sell when impression volume reverts back to normal levels within 3 days.

position_sizing.method: Size positions proportionally to the magnitude of the impression spike, with larger positions allocated for changes of 20% or more.
